title: Red Ollero: Mabuhay Is a Lie
original_title: Red Ollero: Mabuhay is a Lie
overview: In his first major stand-up special, irreverent comedian Red Ollero takes aim at fast food, awkward sex and the trouble with being not-quite-famous.
